hero.title: We transform lives through
hero.description: We are a cultural association founded by young people motivated to improve the quality of life of other young people, using art and non-formal education as engines of inclusion, well-being and social transformation.

actionLines.title: Action Lines
actionLines.description: We work in four fundamental areas for the integral development of young people and their communities.

mobility.title: Mobility Support
mobility.description: We accompany young people in processes of change and adaptation, transforming challenges into opportunities for leadership and cultural connection.

art.title: Artistic Transformation
art.description: We improve self-perception, self-expression, activism and social awareness through various forms of art.

education.title: Alternative Education
education.description: We promote lifelong learning with methodologies that complement conventional education, focused on soft skills.

digital.title: Conscious Digital Citizenship
digital.description: We promote critical and human use of technologies, reducing the digital divide and fostering digital well-being.

aboutPreview.title: Young people building cultural bridges
aboutPreview.description: Based in Gandía, Valencia, we believe in the power of art and non-formal education as engines of inclusion, well-being and transformation. Our mission is to accompany young people in their process of adaptation and personal growth.
aboutPreview.quote: Our projects seek to transform young people from passive spectators into agents of change in their communities, using art as a universal language that transcends the linguistic barriers of migration.

inclusion.title: Inclusion
inclusion.description: We create safe spaces where everyone belongs, regardless of their background.

diversity.title: Diversity
diversity.description: We celebrate differences as our greatest collective strength.

creation.title: Creation
creation.description: We use art as a universal language that transcends barriers.

erasmus.title: European Youth Programs
erasmus.description: We actively participate in Erasmus+ programs, designing and implementing projects that contribute to the European Union priorities in education, training, youth and community development.
erasmus.yearsDescription: of our members in European projects

targetGroups.title: Who do we support?
targetGroups.description: We pay special attention to young people facing barriers to participation.

migrants.description: Navigating cultural integration and seeking a sense of belonging.

disadvantaged.description: Young people from socioeconomic contexts that limit their opportunities.

rural.description: Young people in peripheral areas with limited access to international opportunities.

cta.title: Do you want to be part of the change?
cta.description: Whether as a volunteer, participant or collaborator, there are many ways to join our mission to create more inclusive communities.

hero.title: Young people building cultural bridges
hero.description: Asociación Cultural Colores del Mundo is a youth association founded by young people motivated to improve the quality of life of other young people. Based in Gandía, Valencia, we believe in the power of art and non-formal education as engines of inclusion, well-being and transformation.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To accompany young people through their process of adaptation and personal growth, ensuring a safe environment and opening new opportunities for leadership, expression and cultural connection.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become a reference organization in European youth and culture projects, connecting young people and organizations through Erasmus+ and other EU programs, contributing to the strengthening of European identity, active citizenship and sustainable community development.

about.quote: Our projects seek to transform young people from passive spectators into agents of change in their communities, using art as a universal language that transcends the linguistic barriers of migration.

history.title: From participants to organizers
history.p1: As young people who have lived through experiences of change and adaptation, we know firsthand how important it is to find spaces of belonging and growth. We bring empathy and direct experience to everything we do, which allows us to authentically connect with the young people we accompany.
history.p2: Several of us have participated in Erasmus+ volunteering projects, Youth Exchanges and Training Courses as participants before becoming organizers, so we know from experience what makes these programs impactful in people's lives.
history.p3: Since our creation, we have been actively building our capacity and network, connecting with partner organizations across Europe, participating in partner-finding activities through SALTO-Youth platforms.

team.title: Who we are
team.description: Our team brings together different skills and backgrounds that complement each other naturally.

international.title: International Coordination
international.description: Experience navigating the administrative side of European programs.

facilitation.title: Facilitation & Mentoring
facilitation.description: We create spaces where young people feel safe to open up and share.

creative.title: Creative Backgrounds
creative.description: Writing, visual arts, theater and creative coaching.

digital.title: Digital Tools
digital.description: Communication and conscious use of new technologies.

cta.title: Want to know us better?
cta.description: We are always open to new collaborations and meeting people who share our vision.

hero.title: Action Lines
hero.description: We work in four fundamental areas that complement each other to offer comprehensive support to young people. Each action line is designed to promote personal development, social inclusion and community growth.

hero.title: Projects
hero.description: As a newly established organization, we are starting to develop and create our first projects. Despite this, all members have been involved as participants, facilitators and coordinators in various projects in Europe and Latin America for more than 5 years.

current.title: Building from experience
current.description: We are actively building our capacity and network, connecting with partner organizations across Europe, participating in partner-finding activities through SALTO-Youth platforms, and developing our first Erasmus+ applications.

erasmus.description: Through our Erasmus+ projects, we offer opportunities to travel, learn and connect with young people from all over Europe. Travel and accommodation costs are usually covered by the program.

organization.title: Organization Profile
organization.description: Colores del Mundo is a cultural association founded by young people motivated to improve the quality of life of other young people. Based in Gandía (Valencia, Spain), we use art and non-formal education as engines of inclusion, well-being and social transformation.
organization.fullDescription: We are a youth association founded by young people who have lived through experiences of change and adaptation. We know firsthand how important it is to find spaces of belonging and growth. We bring empathy and direct experience to everything we do, allowing us to authentically connect with the young people we accompany.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To accompany young people through their process of adaptation and personal growth, ensuring a safe environment and opening new opportunities for leadership, expression and cultural connection.
